title: phyllostegia mollis
intro: Phyllostegia mollis, also known as White Top or Island Blite, is a flowering shrub native to the Hawaiian Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Phyllostegia mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
